programme.title: County Line
programme.desc: When his best friend, Sheriff Clint Thorne (Jeff Fahey, Texas Rising, Justified), is brutally gunned down, former neighboring county sheriff, Alden Rockwell (Tom Wopat, The Dukes Of Hazzard, Longmire) is left with many questions and no answers. After the investigation stalls and his replacement, Sheriff Preston (Grant Goodeve, Eight is Enough, Dynasty) turns a blind eye, Alden takes the case into his own hands. Uncovering a web of crime, deceit, and corruption that spreads through two counties, Alden is caught in a deadly criminal network with no backup, no badge, and local diner owner, Maddie (Patricia Richardson, Home Improvement, The West Wing) as his only ally. Seeking justice at any cost, Alden must find out who's behind this criminal enterprise, even if some lines must be crossed.

programme.title: Wagon Train
programme.desc: Wagon Train - The Jud Steele Story: A posse pursues Jud Steele, a wanted gunslinger, and his partner. They join the wagon train to rest their horses. Steele dies trying to steal fresh horses. Hawks returns his belongings to the sheriff, who says Steele died five years ago.

programme.title: Into The Wild Frontier
programme.desc: Into The Wild Frontier - Kit Carson: Fearless Fighter: While coming of age on America's frontier, Kit Carson sets a new standard for steely nerves and fearlessness. But his legend is born when a Native woman is insulted by a notorious bully of the mountains, and Kit challenges the man to a duel to death.

programme.title: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown
programme.desc: Ultimate Cowboy Showdown - Boiling Point on the Ranch: It's a cowboy cook-off with "interesting" results. The cowboys pull an all-nighter to guard cows in the bitter cold and tempers flare.

programme.title: Freedom on the Range
programme.desc: Freedom on the Range - Freedom on the Range: From brave lawmen to rugged cowboys, discover the untold stories of African Americans' cultural significance in the Old West.

programme.title: Wild West Chronicles
programme.desc: Wild West Chronicles - The Legend of the Blue-Eyed Apache: When eleven-year-old Herman Lehmann is torn away from his frontier home by an Apache raiding party, he must adapt in order to survive. He soon forgets the life he unwillingly left behind and is adopted by an Apache family. For close to a decade, he lives as a Native American, learning their language and customs. Eventually, he even joins the same type of raiding party that separated him from his family. Though the years pass by, Herman's mother never gives up hope that she will be reunited with her son. One day, she hears a rumor of a “blue-eyed Apache” now living on a reservation. Could this be her long-lost son? Some years later, Bat Masterson, legendary gunfighter-turned-newspaperman, interviews Herman's mother to uncover the real story of the blue-eyed Apache.

programme.title: Bean Sportfishing
programme.sub-title: Bean Sportfishing - "Cobia Mania in the Gulf of Mexico
programme.desc: Join the Bean Sportfishing Team as head to the Everglades to fish with Capt. Jimmy Wheeler! They target Cobia in the Gulf of Mexico and have an epic, action filled day!

programme.title: Bean Sportfishing
programme.sub-title: Bean Sportfishing - "Tarpon Season in Islamorada, Charter Fishing with Captain Bean
programme.desc: In this episode we join Captain Bean on his charter adventures in the Sportfishing Capital of the World, Islamorada. Captain Bean ventures out in the backcountry hoping for Tarpon and they catch such a variety of fish. Watch as they battle Sharks, Cobia, Goliath Groupers and pretty exotic looking fish.

programme.title: Bean Sportfishing
programme.desc: In this episode the Bean Sportfishing Team joins Captain Dylan Bryan aboard the B n' M for some afternoon Snapper fishing. They target Mangrove Snappers as well as some deep water Mutton Snappers! If you're interested in booking a charter with Captain Dylan on the B n' M, you may contact him directly by calling (305) 393-0848. You can also follow him on Instagram: @captdylanbryan!

programme.title: Bean Sportfishing
programme.sub-title: Bean Sportfishing - "Fishing in Fiji, Part I
programme.desc: In this episode, we journey through the Fijian islands, stopping at Kadavu. We lodge at Oneta Resort and go fishing with Captain Sims, alongside Don & Niu. Our catches range from Coral Trouts and Dogtooth Tunas to Longnose Emperors and the formidable Giant Trevally. Dive into our stunning escapades on Ono Island, a hidden gem in Fiji. Don't miss Part II coming next week!

programme.title: Wild Bearings Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Wild Bearings Outdoors - "Bradley Fork in Great Smoky Mountain National Park in NC
programme.desc: Co-hosts Sam Johnson and Chris Sloan explore and fly-fish the amazing Bradley Fork watershed in GSMNP. Viewers are invited to tag along as they camp on the river and search the waters for the rare and elusive Southern Appalachian Brook Trout. They'll also showcase the watershed's rich history about historic sawmills, Native Americans, early settlers, and the stunning scenery of the destination.

programme.title: Wild Bearings Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Wild Bearings Outdoors - "Soque River Trophy Waters in North GA
programme.desc: In this episode Sam and Chris take country music's “#1 Hit” star Chad Brock fly fishing for the first time on the legendary Soque River in the North Georgia mountains. Viewers will enjoy as they teach Chad how to find and catch trophy trout, and then explore the river's history and amazing scenery. Big “T” Tomasovich provides added insight and guidance finding the trophy trout.

programme.title: Wild Bearings Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Wild Bearings Outdoors - "The Davidson River Watershed in Western NC
programme.desc: In this episode Sam R. Johnson, author of "Fly Fishing the Blue Ridge Parkway" and his Wild Bearings Outdoors co-host Chris Sloan, take you to one of the most famous trout streams in the eastern United States. Trout Unlimited calls it a “A Top 100 Trout Stream in America,” and they will show you why! And to add even more fun, they've invited Kevin Howell of Davidson River Outfitters to come along and chase wild trout in the Davidson's headwaters and some huge trophy trout in Kevin's managed water. It's a firsthand account of the area's history and the fly fishing opportunities along this famous North Carolina river.

programme.title: Wild Bearings Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Wild Bearings Outdoors - "The Watauga River in Eastern TN
programme.desc: Sam R. Johnson, author of "Fly Fishing the Blue Ridge Parkway", and Wild Bearings Outdoors co-host Chris Sloan, provide a firsthand look at the many trout fishing opportunities along the Wilbur Dam tailwater on the Watauga River in eastern TN. They will also fish one of the Watauga's larger tributaries, as well as Beaver Dam Creek close to the VA state line. Lots of fishing action, with details of the river's history, facts about the area's early settlers, Native Americans, local towns, how to get there and where and what to fish for.

programme.title: Wild Bearings Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Wild Bearings Outdoors - "The Etowah River in North GA
programme.desc: Tag along with Sam R. Johnson, author of "Fly Fishing the Blue Ridge Parkway", and Wild Bearings Outdoors co-host Chris Sloan, fish the trophy trout infested waters of the Etowah as it flows through the largest and most scenic winery in North GA. Watch them as they take Montaluce's General Manager, Matthew Garner and teach him how to flyfish and catch trophy trout. Then they'll step out of the river and into the incredibly beautiful Montaluce Winery and its sprawling vineyard. You'll see lots of fishing action, tour the winery and learn about wine making, explore the river's history, as well as that of the Native Americans, settlers, gold miners, and see some beautiful sights. Professional guide Big “T” Tomasovich provides added insight and teaches Matthew how to fly-fish on a 100 year old bamboo rod.

programme.title: Wild Bearings Outdoors
programme.sub-title: Wild Bearings Outdoors - "The Chattahoochee River in North GA
programme.desc: In this episode Sam and Chris take Macy Watkins, hunter, fisher and outdoors social media influencer fly fishing along the Buford Dam tailwater on the Chattahoochee River in North GA. This is big water fly fishing for brown and rainbow trout in a true suburban setting. There's lots of fishing action, details of the river's history, how to get there and where and what to fish for.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Babies love animals, and now you can bring animals from the seven continents home to your baby. Meet dozens of exotic animals including Asian pandas, Australian kangaroos and Arctic snow monkeys...all filmed in their beautiful, natural habitats. Rhythms and songs inspired by faraway lands have been orchestrated especially for little ears and encourage your baby to sing, dance and play to the world beats. You'll laugh together at the funny puppet shows featuring moms and their baby animals.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Learn about the numbers 1,2,3,4 & 5 through rhyme, real-life footage, counting, stories, and repetition - accompanied by classical music and real world imagery.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby MacDonald: A Day On the Farm
programme.desc: As little ones' curiosity about the world blossoms, you can help sow the seeds of discovery with Baby MacDonald: A Day on the Farm. Featuring live-action images, nursery rhymes and fun-filled puppet shows, this playful, interactive program introduces little ones to the exciting sights and sounds of a real working farm.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Every stage is an exciting adventure with your newborn. As babies grow, they absorb a wide variety of sights and sounds. And with so much to see and hear, infants seem to enjoy, and be most soothed by, gentle sounds such as your voice or pleasant, restful music. Treat your child -- and yourself -- to the delights of Baby Bach Musical Adventure, an award-winning program that exposes babies to the joy and majesty of classical music while presenting them with stimulating, colorful images.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Your little one will want to keep a beat, snap his fingers and march his feet! Join new characters Pillie, the musical woodpecker, and Coco, the dancing cockatoo, and share the excitement of rhythm with your baby. World of Rhythm explores rhythm in music, rhythm in nature and rhythm as a form of expression.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Between 12 and 24 months, little ones become increasingly interested in more complex ideas and begin to explore numbers and counting. Numbers Nursery introduces little ones to numerals 1 through 5 in a captivating, interactive way that invites them to join in, clap their hands and count out loud.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby's First Sounds: Discoveries for Little Ears
programme.desc: Perhaps the sweetest sounds you'll ever hear are the babbles and coos that one day become ma-ma, da-da and I love you. Besides being music to your ears, these baby steps of language change everything as your little one discovers an exciting, powerful new way of relating to the world! Baby's First Sounds invites both of you to share these memorable moments: those precious ''firsts'' that come around once in your baby's lifetime.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.desc: Sharing the joys and traditions of the holiday season with your little one is truly one of the greatest gifts of parenthood, and Baby Santa's Music Box makes this magical time even more special! Celebrate by treating your baby and yourself to a captivating wonderland of bright lights, sparkling ornaments, sleigh bells, toys, winter scenes, jolly Santas and more -- all accompanied by beloved holiday melodies.

programme.title: Baby Einstein
programme.sub-title: Baby Da Vinci: From Head to Toe
programme.desc: From the day their eyes open, babies begin to observe new things around the world and about themselves. Baby Da Vinci From Head to Toe presents them with a playful and interactive introduction to the human body in three languages -- English, Spanish, and French. With a whimsical blend of adorable puppets, real children and animals and famous works of art, this captivating program also features upbeat classical music.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. One Berrykin sums it up by telling her she's responsible for presiding over all the activities of the BerryFest to make it the best.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is excitedly making their way through the berry batch in search of the elusive Wanderberry. It is to be the dessert at the BerryFest Feast. Everyone is milling about searching for it on their own when Blueberry points out that the rules say the BerryFest Princess is in charge of the search. The girls turn to her for direction and she points them where she thinks the berry might be.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: Nothing To Fear But Berries Themselves
programme.desc: Overhearing Blueberry reading a story to the baby Berrykins about the scary Galumphalot, Orange is uncharacteristically shaken. She determines she doesn't want anything scary around her, just relaxation. But while the girls are having a hair-styling party at Lemon's salon, a malfunction at the BerryWorks causes the whole town to go dark. And Orange begins to get really anxious.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.sub-title: The Berry Best You Can Bee
programme.desc: Strawberry is at Orange's store to mail a birthday card to a friend in Big Bitty City. Just after she drops the card into the mail slot, an ill postal carrier bee sneezes sending envelopes and post cards flying in all directions. The two girls help Jadeybug, a postal clerk, and Postmaster Bee gather up the strewn letters and the ill bee gets sent home from work.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While rehearsing a song alone in her cafe, Strawberry is interrupted by the arrival of Jadeybug. The poor ladybug is stressed out because her twin cousins, Kadiebug and Sadiebug, left her a message that they are coming to visit for a whole week. Jadey is unable to host them because she's having her guest room repainted.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: While at Orange's general store to pick up a package, Berrykin Bloom chats with Orange about the pogostick he gave her to help her reach the upper shelves. She is very appreciative. He ends up getting a package of special berry seeds he ordered, not the vacation magazine Orange thought he came for. He explains how the seeds were a better purchase because of all the benefits to the Berryworks but now he can no longer afford a vacation.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: All of Berry Bitty City is gathered around to watch the last snowberrykin melt. As the last bit of snow forms a puddle, a cheer goes up, spring is here! It's now time for the annual BerryFest. But with Princess Berrykin out of town on business, who will be the BerryFest Princess and preside over the festival?! Everyone is abuzz with how to go about choosing the Princess and what her duties will be. Postmaster Bee declares the only fair way to go about it is to hold an election. Everyone agrees.

programme.desc: Strawberry opens her front door to a throng of Berrykins all cheering for the new BerryFest Princess. She is appreciative of their admiration but unsure of exactly what her duties entail. In response the Berrykins bombard her with her duties - major to miniscule. programme.desc: While in the midst of a cake decorating demonstration at the café, the girls are uncharacteristically interrupted by an excited Princess Berrykin. She announces the Berrykins have decided to revive the old tradition of the Berry Bitty Buggy Derby. While the girls enthusiastically recount the stories they've heard about it and ask the Princess questions, Blueberry, carrying enough books to block her view, comes through the door and unknowingly interrupts the Princess.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: The grove around Berry Bitty City is abuzz with activity. The Berrykins are using their sparkles to harvest berries, Berrykin Bloom is in his garden spraying flowers with a special solution to make them larger, and Raspberry is nearby gathering flower petals to make perfume. The wind starts to blow and picks up some of the sparkles. The sparkles float along the wind and get combined with some of Berrykin Bloom's solution.

programme.title: Strawberry Shortcake
programme.desc: It's time again for the Dance-Off between the Big Bitty City Dance Team and the Berry Bitty City Dancers. Plum is stressed out and frazzled because she desperately wants to win. And the Big Bitty City Dancers are a force to be reckoned with. They are elegant and beautifully synchronized. Plum shows the girls a maze of dance steps that she's choreographed in the hopes of creating a winning piece. The problem is, the contest is only 1 week away!

programme.sub-title: Sing Along to Your Favourite Songs
programme.desc: It's song and dance time! Join JJ, his friends and family celebrating life's big moments for little kids.

programme.title: Little Angel

programme.title: Morphle
programme.desc: No matter what the town needs, Mila and her magical pet, Morphle will work together to save the day.

programme.title: Morphle
programme.desc: No matter what the town needs, Mila and her magical pet, Morphle will work together to save the day.

programme.title: A Little Rusty
programme.desc: The Cloud of Monstrox and Jestro unlocks a mysterious Forbidden Power. What kind ofhavoc will they unleash? And can Merlok 2.0 and the NEXO KNIGHTS make the new COMBO NEXO Powers work? The Knights finally make it to the Lava Lands – using their various new forms of transport, which are all strictly civilian vechicles – and they must regroup and learn to fight together again to face the new threat of Jestro, the Cloud of Monstrox, and their STONE MONSTERS (in this case, Stone Gargoyles.) But Jestro and his monsters beat back the knights and recover the STAFF OF MONSTROX – which was buried under the ceremonial chamber from Episode 210 (and is now the Lava Puker amusement park ride) – and they get away on Jestro's EVIL MOBILE, which he recovers from the HQ garage. Macy says this is exactly why she's been touring the kingdom preparing everyone for the next attack. The Knights have to get it together because now the entire kingdom is under threat…again. Robin decides he must upgrade the Knights' vehicles and make them more “fight optimized.” Ava and Merlok 2.0 must figure out how to use new NEXO Powers because regular NEXO Powers do make Stone monsters back into stone, but the Cloud simply zaps them to life again. Meanwhile, in the IRON MOUNTAINS, Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find the first of the Forbidden Powers: RELENTLESS RUST. They find the ROGUL STATUE holding the power and zap him to life. Now…they can rust those shiny knights to pieces! Ava and Merlok are attempting to use NEXO COMBO POWERS – with hilarious results – as they try to figure out how they might work. When Jestro attacks, he's able to halt the Fortrex by instantly rusting its tracks and wheels! Robin has his hands full trying to clean all the rust from the attack of Relentless Rust. As the Knights attempt to defend against Jestro, the Cloud is zapping statues to life. He hits a statue with a bolt of lightning as Clay is touching it. Something happens…Clay feels odd stiff as if rock is mixing with his body. Finally, Ava and Merlok 2.0 download to the Knights their new thing: a COMBO NEXO COMBO Power. It works! It can smash the animated statues to dust! They use it to defeat Jestro, but he and the Cloud get away with the Forbidden Power of Relentless Rust. Victory … sort of. Clay talks to Merlok 2.0…something has happened to him. What can they do? Merlok 2.0 is very concerned.

programme.title: The Last Hope
programme.desc: When the Ninjas' attempt to return Garmadon's ‘Helmet of Darkness' to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago. With the Overlord and Garmadon nearing completion of the Super-Weapon, Misako tells the group she thinks there could be one last chance at preventing Lloyd's final battle with his father. She believes if they can steal the helmet off Garmadon's head and return it to it's rightful perch on the Celestial Clock, it could stop the clock before it reaches zero, thus preventing the final battle from beginning. Dressed as Warriors, the Ninja escort their ‘captive' Misako to Garmadon, and the heroes see glimpses of the Super-Weapon being built. In a thrilling escape, Misako cleverly steals Garmadon's helmet, and they race to the Celestial Clock. Lloyd has a brief encounter with his father, and hesitates striking him. When they return the helmet to its rightful perch, they're one second too late, allowing the clock to reach zero, and for it to focus a beam of concentrated light from the sky into the Super-Weapon. Nya is taken hostage, as the others fall off a cliff, barely surviving the fall. The Ninja have failed -- the final battle has begun.

programme.title: Thunderstox
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox encounters the sculptor. He helps unleash a horde of fierce garden gnomes on Knighton. What will the NEXO KNIGHTS do against this new enemy? Will their new COMBO NEXO Powers do the trick? As Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox head off on the Evil Mobile to 'store' the Forbidden Power in a secret location, they encounter…THE SCULPTOR. His real name is ROBERTO ARNOLDI. He's a sensitive and odd artist who has been laid off by the king (the King ordered a "smashing" statue of the Queen, and the Sculptor made a statue of the Queen literally smashing monsters. He takes everything very literally.) Jestro instructs him to make a "bad" statue that he can use to attack the knights. The Sculptor sets to work. Meanwhile, the NEXO KNIGHTS are discussing the COMBO NEXO Powers, the Forbidden Powers, and what all this means. Lance, meanwhile, decides that since his talk show career is on hold, he thinks he'll install cameras in the Fortrex and do a Big Brother-like expose show on the Knights (he decides NOT to tell the others.) Merlok 2.0 and the Cloud of Monstrox (each talking to their cohorts) explain the history of the Forbidden Powers: it's a history lesson about the WIZARDS' COUNCIL, the Forbidden Powers, and how they were stopped long ago. This visual montage leads Jestro to…MOUNT THUNDERSTROX. The Cloud of Monstrox shows him the circle of ten Standing Stones where he will insert the Forbidden Powers. "What'll happen after that?” asks Jestro, curious. "Oh, I don't want to spoil the surprise," says the Cloud. They insert the first Forbidden Power, Relentless Rust, and it locks into place on its stone. They go off to battle the Knights and collect the "bad" statue the sculptor is making. But he's made a literally bad statue…it's terrible ... garden gnomes. Like an amateur art student. And…it's not even finished. ("You can't rush bad genius!") The Knights attack with their newly modified vehicles and they succeed in destroying the Evil Mobile. They then try to use a COMBO NEXO Power, but can't…it had to be perfect to work (Ava and Merlok need to work on it.) As Jestro and the Cloud retreat, Merlok again talks to Clay about turning to stone! Merlok calls in Robin…he will need him to build something to help Clay as he becomes more and more impaired.

programme.title: Return Of The Overlord
programme.desc: When Garmadon uses his new Super-Weapon to turn Jamakai Village evil, he unwittingly unsettles the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possesses his body. Lord Garmadon witnesses the Super-Weapon come to life, revealing it to be ‘Garma-Tron', a giant moving cannon. His first test subject is Nya. Meanwhile, the heroes prepare for the final battle and sneak-attack Garmadon's compound…only to find it empty. The Super-Weapon is moving towards the coastline, where the cannon's range can reach Ninjago. On the way there, the Ninja must face off with Evil Nya, turned dark from the Super-Weapon. On the coastline, Lloyd battles his father atop Garma-Tron. The battle is fierce, but Lloyd fails at stopping his father from firing Garma-Tron, turning Jamanakai Village evil. Garmadon naively celebrates, not realizing he's undone the balance, allowing the spirit of the Overlord to cross over and possess his body. And as the Overlord continues to get more powerful, a hideous metamorphosis is taking place. Lloyd must fight the Overlord, and just when it looks like good will prevail, Lloyd is injured and thrown to the ground. In the end, the villains escape through a portal to Ninjago, and our heroes are abandoned on the island with no way home. And with the Green Ninja injured, it looks like all is lost. Evil has won.

programme.title: Rotten Luck
programme.desc: Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox unleashes the Forbidden Power Ravaging Rot on Knighton! Turning everything into green gooey rot. But Robin has an awesome new invention that could help the NEXO KNIGHTS Jestro and the Cloud of Monstrox find a second Forbidden Power near the falling down Swamp Castle: RAVAGING ROT. With this power, they can make everything in the kingdom rot – food, vegetation, anything that grows or is natural. And that's exactly what they do! It's awful and makes everything stink. The Sculptor start to sculpt a portable HeadQuarter for his master, Jestro. Jestro expects it to be done when they return from ravaging the land. Axl is very concerned – he's into organic food ... and now food starts to rot. Merlok 2.0 and Ava are continuing to work on perfecting the COMBO NEXO Powers. We see display screens of MANY of the NEXO Powers. But there's a huge power consumption issue with these new-fangled combos. “I'll have to find an algorithmic power curve consumption solution, magic man,” says Ava. “I always just sort of choose them by, uh, feel.” “What do you feel like?” “Uh, a ham sandwich, a banana, and dragon fire,” responds Merlok. “That produced a combo with 2% efficiency,” says Ava. “This is why we have to actually THINK about and study perfec Combos. We need automatic power integration.” The Knights must stop Jestro from rotting all the food and living plant matter in Knighton and Axl leads the charge. But as they finally confront Jestro, who's trying to rot a field of beans near Fruitbridge, they're hit by his finally completed ROLLING HQ (the Sculptor is proud of the “artsy” elements.) … it's not exactly perfect though … he took the idea of Head Quarter a little too litteral and created a big head. Finally, in this conclusive battle where the knights get strapped on a rotting bridge, Clay emerges in a sleek, new BATTLE SUIT that Robin built for him because he was starting to have trouble moving around (the whole turning to stone thing.) It's smaller and more high-tech than the bigger Mechs of the past. Clay's able to drive Jestro off. Jestro, at the end of the episode, puts the Forbidden Power of Ravaging Rot into Mount Thunderstrox. Meanwhile, back at the Fortrex, Axl makes an organic food feast for all his fellow Knights.

programme.title: Rise Of The Snakes
programme.desc: The four Ninja are snapped out of their post-hero complacency when Lord Garmadon's young son Lloyd shows up and tries to pick up where his father left off. The Ninja dismiss him as a threat, but regret that choice after Lloyd wakes up the evil snake tribe. A prophecy is revealed that states a green ninja will ultimately defeat Lord Garmadon.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 1
programme.desc: When Jestro the Jester finds the Book of Monsters, chaos breaks loose in the Kingdom of Knighton. Can the newly graduated Knights from the Knights' Academy save the kingdom? It's final graduation fighting exams for the latest Knights from Knights' Academy. All our new Knights demonstrate their prowess: CLAY, AARON, AXL and LANCE. PRINCESS MACY get to join them, but her father doesn't want her to graduate. As part of the entertainment, MERLOK does an amazing magic trick. His act is followed by…JESTRO, the King's Jester. He's terrible (and he should know to never follow a better act.) Everyone laughed because he's a real joke....a total failure. While Jestro roams the halls fo the King's Castle, forlorn, he hears the BOOK OF MONSTERS calling to him from Merlok's library. The book talks Jestro into gathering as many books of spells as he can carry, but they're interrupted by...Clay! As Jestro quickly pages through the Book of Monsters to attack Clay, Merlok arrives. There's a battle in the library between Jestro and Merlok. Finally, the wizard summons up his most powerful spell in self-defence. BOOM! There's a big, magical explosion and when Clay forces his way back into the library, Merlok, Jestro and the magic books are...GONE!

programme.title: New Girl in Town
programme.desc: When the World Petacular comes to Heartlake City and is almost ruined before it's even started, five feisty girls unite, despite their differences, using their creativity to save the day. Best friends Olivia, Andrea, Emma, Mia and Stephanie reside in HeartLake City but didn't know each other - that is until the World Petacular brought them together! On the eve of the biggest event Heartlake City hosts, disaster and chaos is abound. New-in-town Olivia is helping her veterinarian Aunt Sophie with her mobile clinic. But when she's put in charge of training a scruffy puppy named Scarlet, the puppy runs amuck, leaving a trail of destruction as she collides with Andrea, ruins Emma's banner and Stephanie's cakes, and finally spooks Mia's horse Bella who bucks Mia off and sprints away. The girls quickly unite, helping each-other to save the day and most importantly have fun along the way!

programme.title: Home
programme.desc: Back in training mode with the looming threat of Lloyd and the Hypnobrai, Zane wanders after a Falcon and lands himself in a heap of trouble. The rest of the Ninja leave the training dojo to help him and return to find that the snakes have burned it to the ground.

programme.title: The Book Of Monsters, Part 2
programme.desc: Realizing they must defend the Kingdom from Jestro's monsters, the Knights try to organize but are despondent when they discover their best advisor – Merlok the Magician – has sacrificed himself to save them. When Jestro awakens, he's been blasted miles and miles away from the King's Castle by Merlok's explosive spell. And, it seems, all the books he was trying to steal have been scattered, too. The Book of Monsters broke Jestro' fall and now he can use the book to attack the people who laughed at him. Meanwhile, the King and his newly-trained Knights pick through the rubble of Merlok's library. They'll have to figure something out, because Jestro and his newly made magic monsters attack King's Castle! Clay organizes the Knights to defend the kingdom, but they've never worked together before. It takes all their training, plus the help of an old friend…MERLOK! Only now he's MERLOK 2.0. Ava has been piecing together what happened and discovering that the “ghost in the machine” she's been chasing is really Merlok in digital form. Now, he can use his magic digitally and he downloads just the right weapons to the struggling Knights! They finally foil Jestro's attack with Merlok's help and officially become NEXO KNIGHTS!

programme.title: Stephanie's Surprise Party
programme.desc: When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they soon discover that it's not easy keeping their plans secret from Stephanie who becomes suspicious when none of the girls have time to hang out. When Emma, Olivia, Andrea and Mia plan a surprise party for Stephanie's birthday, they discover that it's not easy keeping their plans a secret. As the girls choreograph a dance routine, magic show and search for the perfect present and cake, Stephanie becomes aware that her friends are avoiding her on her birthday and excluding her from their activities... Little does she know that her friends are secretly preparing a surprise pool party for her! Once the surprise is revealed Stephanie realises how much her friends care about her and the importance of friendship.

programme.title: Snakebit
programme.desc: Lloyd, having been kicked out of the Hynobrai snake tribe unlocks a second tribe – The Fangpyres – to help him regain control. The Ninja are busy setting up their new HQ that Zane discovered, but are called to duty when the Fangpyres attack the village where Jay's family lives.

programme.title: The Power Of Merlok
programme.desc: When Jestro attacks a village on the far side of the Kingdom, the NEXO-Knights wonder how they'll get there. Then Macy remembers her dad has a royal RV…maybe they can “mod” that for their own, “knightly” use? Now the NEXO-Knights get rolling…in THE FORTREX, their own ROLLING CASTLE! This great new HQ, which houses Merlok 2.0 as an operating system, will be how the knights move around Knighton and protect it from Jestro and his monsters. Speaking of the evil jester, in this episode Jestro uses some newly-made monsters to attack a town far from the capitol where he thinks he's safe from the Knights' reach. We see two parallel stories here: the Knights training, learning more about digital magic and getting organized as a team and at the same time we see Jestro making monsters, trying to learn how his powers work and talking to the Book. In the end, the Knights roll up in their castle and defeat Jestro and his marauding monsters. Lance thinks he should be the leader because he's a snot. “Of course I'm the leader…I'm a Richmond.”

programme.title: Dolphin Cruise
programme.desc: Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a science contest at school and win a trip on a luxury yacht but not everything goes as planned when they set out to sea. When Olivia, Stephanie, Andrea, Mia and Emma enter a school science contest and win a Dolphin sight-seeing trip, not everything goes to plan...As the girls set out to sea on a luxury yacht, misunderstandings and disagreements occur which become secondary when they discover a pod of dolphins in danger. The girls learn that they have to compromise and trust in each other if they are to save the dolphins and their trip out to sea...

programme.title: Never Trust A Snake
programme.desc: After the Fangpyres join forces with the Hypnobrai, Lloyd awakens Pythor – the last remaining snake of the Anacondrai tribe. Pythor lures Lloyd under his spell and steals a map from him that will show him where the remaining two snakes tribes dwell and Uncle Sensei saves Lloyd from doom.

programme.title: The Knights Code
programme.desc: Jestro uses the Book of Chaos to unleash, um, chaos and attack the King's hover train to try and kidnap the royal party. Can the NEXO-Knights bring order out of the chaos and save the King? Jestro finds the Book of Chaos in the countryside and decides he must feed it to the book. The Book of Monsters actually tells Jestro NOT to feed it to him he tells Jestro he's not ready for that kind of power. But Jestro doesn't listen. Now the Book unleashes chaotic monsters and Jestro uses them to attack the King and his party who are on a business-related tour of the kingdom. When the NEXO-Knights show up to stop the monster attacks and realize that they must save King and Queen Halbert – Macy's parents – from the chaotic evil monsters that have been unleashed. Clay asserts himself as leader and brings order to the knights from the chaos. He has his own book: the Book of the Knight's Code. They should all live by it.

programme.title: Country Girls
programme.desc: When the girls go to Mia's grandparents' ranch and Olivia accidentally knocks down the neighbor's barn, the girls promise to raise money to rebuild it and now have to learn to set aside their differences and work together to make good on their promise. Mia invites her friends to her grandparents' ranch for the weekend. But when Olivia accidentally knocks down a neighbor's barn with a tractor, the girls promise to raise the money to rebuild it themselves. Complicating matters, Mia and Stephanie turn out to like the same boy, Martin. They'll have to learn to set aside their differences and work together if they're going to raise enough money to make good on their promise.

programme.title: Leonardo
programme.desc: Leonardo With time running out, Leo embarks on a dangerous plan to spring his maestro from jail.

programme.title: Leonardo
programme.desc: Leonardo An evening of surprises and danger awaits when the Medici throw a lavish Masked Ball.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High A new term begins with the disappearance of the American President.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High A new supercomputer leaves the spies redundant, but all is not as it seems.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High A fashion designer's dangerous plans are unearthed by the team.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High Blane discovers a dark side effect of an Olympic athlete's exercise machine.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High Good kids are turning bad and the team need to find out why.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High Someone is leaking footage of bad behaviour at the school, but who and why?

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High A super-flu is spreading and only a dead scientist has the cure.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High Head lice are causing children to turn to crime and suspicion falls on the nit nurse.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High The team's former enemies have been retrained as spies, but can they be trusted?

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High An audacious diamond thief is on the loose and MI High are protecting the Crown Jewels.

programme.title: MI High
programme.desc: MI High When a spy plane goes missing, Blane goes undercover to track it down.

programme.title: Room at the Top
programme.desc: Strawberry is really touched when her girlfriends and the Berrykins volunteer to help her with the construction of her new marketplace, so when the girls suggest they take charge of designing Strawberry's dream-bedroom to go on the second story, of course Strawberry agrees. While construction is going on, the girls each show Strawberry their individual ideas for the bedroom. Grateful for the support and not wanting to dampen anyone's enthusiasm, Strawberry tells each of them yes (actually, more like not-no).

programme.title: Foods that Smell
programme.desc: Lily and Avery follow their noses to find out what gives foods their amazing aromas. Avery enjoys a super garlicky Caesar salad, and then tries to sniff out a cure for his ghastly garlic breath. Lily makes a splash at the fish market where she gets to the bottom of seafood's suspicious smells. Together, they take on the ultimate olfactory challenge: recreating Matt's Amazing Seafood Chowder, by sense of smell alone!

programme.title: Foods that Melt
programme.desc: Watch foods melt before your eyes! Chill out as Lily tries to solve the mystery behind Baked Alaska, a frozen dessert that doesn't melt in the oven. Onthe hunt for a simple snack, Avery visits a local cheese shop and discovers there's moreto cheese than just cheddar! Back at the kitchen with Matt, Lily and Avery use a varietyof cheeses and fresh veggiesto see who can make thebest twist on an ooey-gooey melted favourite: grilled cheese sandwiches!

programme.title: The Sticker Chart
programme.desc: Sid wonders, who needs charts anyway? After a day of investigating, Sid learns that charts are great science tools that help you compare and contrast all kinds of cool stuff like snacks, pets and even chores!

programme.title: The Rolie Polie
programme.desc: At school, he discovers an amazing science tool: the magnifying glass! Sid and his friends explore their world using the magnifying glass to make things look bigger, like freckles on their skin, little pebbles and rolie polie legs!

programme.title: Sky's the Limit
programme.desc: When a storm causes a giant boulder to cut off Berry Bitty City's water supply, Strawberry and the girls face the possibility of having to move away from their homes. With the help of Mr. Longface Caterpillar, the girls set out on an adventure to save their town.

programme.title: Tarzan and Jane
programme.desc: After returning to London, Tarzan and Jane encounter Jane's mother, Angela, a celebrity-cum-journalist who is researching an expose claiming Greystoke Industries harms the environment. The truth is someone is trying to destroy Greystoke Industries. Tarzan and Jane must figure out who this mystery saboteur is while battling fires, snakes, and sneak attacks. With this Mastermind's henchmen trying to stop them at every turn, our young heroes must take part in a thrilling, multi-country adventure in order to save Greystoke Industries and finally put an end to the criminal enterprise that threatens to put the environment and countless lives - human and animal alike - in danger!

programme.title: Blippi's Great Green Adventure
programme.desc: In this special episode, Blippi celebrates Earth Day with his Great Green Adventure. Caring for the environment is one of our prime responsibilities and Blippi teaches children how by taking them on a puzzle-solving adventure.

programme.title: Starlight, Star Bright
programme.desc: With time running out before the Grand Opening celebration for the new Marketplace, Strawberry's friends get the idea to invite her favorite singer, superstar CHERRY JAM, to be the guest singer. The girls are blown away when their berryjuice cell phone gets a text message that Cherry accepts their invitation! Strawberry is touched by their surprise, but reminds them that now the town and Marketplace really have to shine! The girls and Berrykins rush to turn the Marketplace Café into a suitable performance area for a big star like Cherry Jam.

programme.title: Practice Makes Perfect
programme.desc: Cherry Jam is so enjoying staying in Berry Bitty City, that she calls her managers in Big Bitty City and informs them that she is going to stay for a much needed vacation! Strawberry and the girls are thrilled that she will be with them for a little longer, and they do all they can to make their guest comfortable. But Cherry doesn't want to be treated like a guest she wants to fit in and contribute to the community. Plum suggests that she teach music lessons Plum has always wanted to learn the drums, as it would enhance her ability to give dance lessons with live rhythmic accompaniment.

programme.title: KidCity
programme.desc: Play along with the KidCity family —Little Flash, Ava, DadCity, and MomCity— in all their kid-friendly games!

programme.title: Onyx Family
programme.desc: Onyx Family is best known for their spooky skits, starring the Onyx Kids: Shiloh, Shasha, Sinead, and Shalom.

programme.title: Challenge Squad
programme.desc: Challenge Squad takes on the most epic challenges, featuring your favorite YouTube stars!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: EvanTubeHD
programme.desc: Share in the fun with YouTube star EvanTubeHD, his sister JillianTubeHD, and the whole Tube Family!

programme.title: HobbyKidsTV
programme.desc: Come along for the fun with popular YouTube family, HobbyKidsTV! Plus, HobbyKids Adventures!

programme.title: Fishtronaut
programme.desc: The series tells the story of Fishtronaut, a fish in a spacesuit, similar to reverse scuba gear, which allows him to fly and breathe out of water.

programme.title: JKrew
programme.desc: JKrew is a vlogging family that also loves to do challenges and skits. Be part of our Krew:)!

programme.title: Little Box of Horrors
programme.desc: Tenoroc summons Pandora, who assumes the guise of a young girl. Thanks to Gomez and a pterodactyl called Eunice, Pandora's wicked dual nature is revealed... but too late to stop her unlocking fearsome telekinetic powers.

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Follow the silly adventures of everyone's favorite singing and dancing animated gummy bear and his friends Kala the Cat and Harry the Chameleon

programme.title: Cat & Keet
programme.desc: Cat and Keet is the classic chase comedy with the unscrupulous Cat on one side and the very resourceful parrot Keet on the other side.

programme.title: Chai Chai
programme.desc: When the cafe owner, waiter guard dog and naughty food loving monkey comes together, it becomes chaotic. A chase comedy for all ages.

programme.title: Darwin & Newts
programme.desc: Darwin & Newts are two siblings who go on fantastic escapades, discovering and experimenting with early science and engineering principles, all the while exploring the natural wonders of the outside world.

programme.title: 3 Rabbits
programme.desc: It's a funny cartoon for children about 3 Rabbits stuck in a deep cave.

programme.title: OK Gamer Kids Vs Pros
programme.desc: Super Girl Kels takes a break from her busy tournament schedule to face off and show off!

programme.title: LEGO Set Builds Ninjago: Mountain Shrine / Kai's Ninja Ambush / Jay & Skull Motorbike / Ice Dragon / Spinjitzu Dojo / Garmadon's Dark Fortress

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: Matt Knudsen was born in Hawaii, raised in the Mid-west and sailed around the world as a merchant marine. As an actor, Matt shared the big screen with Oscar winner Sean Penn in Gangster Squad, or you may also recognize him from his appearances in shows like Crazy Ex-Girlfriend, Key & Peele, Workaholics, The League, Big Love, Boston Legal or Malcolm in the Middle just to name a few. Matt has also been a part of several high profile commercial campaigns for companies including: Apple, IBM, GE, Volkswagen, DirecTV, Pepsi and more which have aired during the Superbowl and The Olympics. As a comedian, he's appeared on Conan, The Late Late Show, Last Call, ASX Live and Comics Unleashed, as well as dozens of festivals, including: Montreal Just for Laughs (Best of the Fest), The San Francisco Sketchfest, Bridgetown, High Plains, Limestone and has even entertained at The White House for President and Mrs. Obama.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy

programme.title: Buddy Fitzpatrick

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: JJ Barrows was raised in South Carolina as the middle child of a preacher's family. Having always felt a little different, JJ uses humor to navigate through the realities of life.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.desc: After forty years performing a blend of stand-up, story, and shtick, Bob Stromberg brings his style to the trials of aging.

programme.title: Marc Yaffee
programme.desc: Adopted at birth and confused ever since, Marc takes his audiences on a comedy joyride as he explores his multi-ethnic roots and the culture clashes that fill his world. Marc's smart but relatable comedy demonstrates a universal appeal that has landed him appearances on PBS, Comics Unleashed, The Latino Laugh Festival and the Showtime special, Goin' Native. Funny not filthy, Marc serves audiences his original comedy recipe, specially prepared for non- stop laughs. Tasty topics, spicy premises and savory punchlines, are all dished out with a dash of sarcasm and a grain of salt. A regular in Las Vegas, Marc has performed six times overseas for Armed Forces Entertainment and he's a past winner of Ventura Comedy Festival's Funniest Person Contest.

programme.title: Dry Bar Comedy
programme.sub-title: My Life As I Know It Now
programme.desc: With an act that crosses all boundaries, B.T. will surely have you rolling with laughter. His physical performance style and charm landed him two performances on NBC's Friday Night Videos and a performance at the prestigious HBO U.S. Comedy Arts Festival. B.T. has also appeared on BET's Comic View, MTV's The Jenny McCarthy Show, and FOX's The Keenan Ivory Wayans Show.

programme.title: Don Barnhart
programme.desc: Don's ability to keep audiences of all ages howling with laughter and coming back for more is what separates him from the average joke teller.

programme.title: David Dyer
programme.desc: David Dyer has been performing at stand-up at comedy clubs and corporate events for over twenty years. He's worked with some of the best comics in the industry including Mike Birbiglia, Jim Breuer, and Lewis Black. He's been a contributing writer to NBC's Late Night with Jimmy Fallon and ABC's Politically Incorrect. He's a regular on the nationally syndicated Bob and Tom Show and often appears on the roster for their “Friends of The Bob and Tom Show” comedy tour. He's the host of a new web series called Sidecar Sessions where he interviews guests who are sitting in the sidecar of his motorcycle as David pilots the bike around town. David also created and stars in another web series called Pillars with co-star, Kevin Yon. David became an on-call firefighter with Grand Rapids Township in Michigan….his wife is nervous.

programme.desc: When a chain of volcanic eruptions rips through Europe, the enormous ash cloud blocks out the sun, plunging the continent into a new ice age. An American couple must find their kids and get them out of Paris before it freezes over.

programme.title: The Little Mermaid

programme.title: Hollow Creek
programme.desc: Trying to find inspiration for his next horror novel, Blake retreats to the Appalachian Mountains with his mistress, Angelica. When she disappears, Blake becomes a prime suspect.

programme.title: Life of a King
programme.desc: An ex-felon on a path of redemption defies convention and establishes a Chess Club for inner-city teenagers.

programme.title: Buster's Mal Heart
programme.desc: In this bold thriller spiked with dark humor, Rami Malek is a family man whose chance encounter with a conspiracy-obsessed drifter leaves him on the run from the police and an impending event known as The Inversion.

programme.title: A Soldier's Revenge
programme.desc: Haunted by wartime horrors, Civil War soldier-turned-bounty hunter Frank Connor spends his postwar time polishing off two things: whiskey and fugitives.

programme.title: Oliver Stone's The Untold History of The United States: The Untold History Of The United States

programme.title: Miami
programme.desc: Angela (29) blows into a small town in the Finnish countryside, dazzling the locals with her exotic dancer troupe, sequined swirls and mega-watt smile. After a nasty encounter backstage she leaves town just as fast, only now with her estranged half-sister Anna (21) in tow. Anna gladly exchanges a dreary life in a bakery for an adrenaline-fueled existence on stage. Happy to be closer to her glamorous older sister, she embraces the world of exotic dancing. But none of the champagne bubbles, sparkly make-up and happy house beats can protect her as she tries blackmail to save Angela from the trouble that keeps following her. Dark forces from the underworld test their newly found sisterhood.

programme.title: The Mimic
programme.desc: A screenwriter (Thomas Sadoski) explores the lighter side of a sociopath when he befriends a new neighbor (Jake Robinson) on the local newspaper. After unsettling rendezvous, he sets out to learn his true intentions.

programme.title: The Sand Dune
programme.desc: A restaurant on the coast of Texas, is a place where fate intervenes in lives of two young people, Aylin and Jake. In a heartbreaking series of events, two soul mates are forced apart. Many years later yet another chance encounter.

programme.title: Go Back to China
programme.desc: When spoiled rich girl Sasha Li blows through half of her trust fund, she is cut off by her father and forced to go back to China and work for the family toy business.

programme.title: Her Husband's Affairs
programme.desc: Trouble abounds when an advertising executive and his meddling, madcap wife team up to promote a crackpot inventor's new embalming fluid.

programme.title: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: A couple faces divorce after a wife's plan to teach her unfaithful husband a lesson backfires.

programme.title: The Lone Wolf Keeps A Date
programme.desc: The Lone Wolf, William, is in Havana and helps Robinson retrieve $10,000 that was stolen from her. The money is for her boy friend's release from prison for a crime he didn't commit. William locates the gang of crooks and plays both sides of the law in order to return the money to Robinson.

programme.title: The Taming Of The Shrew
programme.desc: A rambunctious version of Shakespeare's comedy about a rich merchant who has two daughters, one sweet, comely and shy and the other gorgeous but mean-tempered. The sweet-tempered daughter is being courted by several young men who are stunned when her father announces that she cannot marry until her sister does.

programme.title: The Rifleman

programme.desc: Adventurer George Kourounis' patience is tested as he encounters deadly wildlife and challenging elements while preparing to descend into Marum Volcano in the South Pacific.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Polar Quest
programme.desc: Stormhunters Mark and Jaclyn visit Canada's Arctic to see how the inhabitants live. Jaclyn also hopes to achieve one of her lifelong goals to come face to face with a polar bear. Will she be able to cross this off her bucket list?

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Shifting Winds
programme.desc: Mark and Jaclyn make their annual trek to Tornado Alley and this time they are looking for more than severe thunderstorms and tornadoes. They also want answers as to whether Climate Change is causing changes to Tornado Alley.

programme.title: Storm Hunters | Hurricane Havoc
programme.desc: They aren't strangers to nature's extremes, but Hurricanes Harvey and Irma give Stormhunters Mark Robinson and Jaclyn Whittal a run for their money, as the costliest and deadliest tropical storms batter the US south east.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Throwing Porta Potties to the Wind
programme.desc: The world is a dangerous place, and with wild weather occurances happening every 20 seconds, it's no wonder we never have a shortage of footage to showcase here. The videos we have gathered are guarenteed to blow you away, so let's not waste anymore time and jump right into it.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Steal My Thunder
programme.desc: Weather. Noun. The state of the atmosphere with respect to heat or cold, wetness or dryness, calm or storm, clearness or cloudiness. As in, "I can't wait to see what kind of weather we have today so I can record it for my favorite TV show, Extreme Weather Countdown."

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Oh Hail No
programme.desc: What's windy, wild, and wet all over? The weather, of course! And over the next half hour, we're bringing you some of the craziest moments ever captured on camera! From the hailstorms that destory windows to the breathtaking tornados, we've got it all, right here on Extreme Weather Countdown.

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | Water Under the Bridge
programme.desc: Get ready, because the forecast says you're in for a blustery day, followed by some heavy rain, and a slight chance of a tornado. It may seem out of the ordinary, but that's just another day in paradise here on Extreme Weather Countdown!

programme.title: Extreme Weather Countdown | The Final Countdown
programme.desc: When bad weather strikes, most people head in doors, but we head right into the heart of it. And now you can too, experiencing every thunderbolt, every dust storm, and every flood, all from the comfort of your own home. Let's jump right in!

programme.title: Close Up and Personal
programme.desc: Inspiring, life-affirming personal stories. 1) My journey from Marine to actor | Adam Driver 2) Frida Kahlo: The woman behind the legend - Iseult Gillespie 3) The price of shame | Monica Lewinsky 4) How one scientist took on the chemical industry 5) Notes of a native son: the world according to James Baldwin - Christina Greer

programme.title: Art of the Future
programme.desc: What does it look like inside the mind of a machine? See what creativity lies and thrives within, and meet those looking to unleash it. 1) How film changes the way we see the world | Ava DuVernay 2) How Netflix changed entertainment -- and where it's headed | Reed Hastings 3) How targeted ads might just save your life | Sandersan Onie

programme.title: Procrastination Station
programme.desc: Fascinating ideas for when you should probably be doing something else. 1) Is humanity smart enough to survive itself? | Jeanette Winterson 2) How do governments create money out of thin air? | Jonathan Smith 3) The incredible creativity of deepfakes -- and the worrying future of AI | Tom Graham 4) How to build for human life on Mars | Melodie Yashar 5) The infinite life of pi - Reynaldo Lopes

programme.title: The Art of Being Human
programme.desc: Beautiful, intimate and ultimately uplifting stories of challenge and humanity -- from making a new home in a strange country, to rebuilding life after unthinkable tragedy. 1) How I found myself -- by impersonating other people | Melissa Villaseñor 2) How to squeeze all the juice out of retirement | Riley Moynes 3) When we design for disability, we all benefit | Elise Roy 4) Love, sorrow and the emotions that power climate action | Knut Ivar Bjørlykhaug

programme.title: Overlooked History
programme.desc: A collection of histories textbooks and school syllabuses leave out. 1) What really caused the Irish Potato Famine | Stephanie Honchell Smith 2) History vs. Egypt's "most powerful" pharaoh | Jessica Tomkins 3) A day in the life of a Celtic Druid | Philip Freeman 4) One of history's most dangerous myths | Anneliese Mehnert 5) Why did the US try to kill all the bison? | Andrew C. Isenberg 6) How horses changed history | William T. Taylor 7) What few people know about the program that "saved" America | Meg Jacobs 8) How did Apartheid happen, and how did it finally end? | Thula Simpson 9) What happened when the United States tried to ban alcohol | Rod Phillips 10) How does impeachment work? - Alex Gendler

programme.title: Legends of Design
programme.desc: Some of history's greatest designers share intriguing perspectives and vignettes from their prolific journeys. 1) Inside the massive (and unregulated) world of surveillance tech | Sharon Weinberger 2) How do jetpacks work? And why don't we all have them? | Richard Browning 3) The sustainable brilliance of Indigenous design | Manu Peni 4) How do you build a sacred space? | Siamak Hariri 5) Why do beavers build dams? | Glynnis Hood 6) Autofocusing reading glasses of the future | Nitish Padmanaban

programme.title: Say What?
programme.desc: Explore the curious world of language and how it shapes the way we think. 1) The nit-picking glory of The New Yorker's Comma Queen | Mary Norris 2) Go ahead, make up new words! | Erin McKean 3) Why is there a "b" in doubt? - Gina Cooke 4) How to take the BS out of business speak | Bob Wiltfong 5) What's a snollygoster? A short lesson in political speak | Mark Forsyth 6) How computers translate human language - Ioannis Papachimonas
